items.title: Clearing 160MHz in upper C-band will cost $3.6B, SES says
items.summary: SES says it will cost about $3.6 billion to clear up to 160MHz of spectrum in the upper C-band, with the bulk of those costs linked to new Ku-band satellites with C-band uplinks.

items.summary: Signals Research Group (SRG) tested Nokia’s zero-forcing Multi-User MIMO (MU-MIMO) and compared it with the legacy implementation of MU-MIMO in T-Mobile’s network.

items.title: Ericsson Private 5G powers safer, smarter mining in Western Australia
items.summary: At Newmont’s Boddington mine in Australia, Ericsson Enterprise Wireless Solutions helps drive autonomous mining with reliable 5G connectivity and improved safety.

items.title: How Ericsson Private 5G is reshaping autonomous mining in Australia
items.summary: Learn how one mine in Australia replaced Wi-Fi with Ericsson’s Private 5G to power autonomous machines and reshape industrial work.

items.title: Newmont advances mining automation with Ericsson Enterprise Wireless Solutions in Australia
items.summary: Learn how Ericsson is helping Newmont bring private 5G to life—powering everything from giant autonomous drills to the smart tools miners could soon use every day.

items.title: Blue Planet, Telefónica Deutschland create 5G network slices with AI
items.summary: According to Kailem Anderson with Blue Planet, the design of 5G network slices has taken surprisingly long – sometimes weeks.

items.title: OpenVault launches Vantage Fiber proactive PON service assurance product
items.summary: OpenVault says its new product drives faster, less costly detection and resolution of network and subscriber issues.

items.title: Federated Wireless launches Spectrum AI for shared spectrum
items.summary: Federated Wireless today announced general availability of Spectrum AI, a physical AI platform built for shared spectrum planning and coordination.

items.title: Samsung's Network in a Server: Future-Ready Enterprise Use Cases
items.summary: Revolutionizing retail, logistics, manufacturing and more with Samsung's Network in a Server: a private network solution powering AI-driven connectivity. Learn more from Samsung.

items.title: Are telcos doing network APIs all wrong?
items.summary: Network APIs were supposed to unlock 5G’s next revenue wave. Years later, telcos are still wrestling with the basics. Are they barking up the wrong tree?

items.title: Nokia, Google Cloud unleash Gemini-powered AI agents to fix telco network headaches
items.summary: Nokia and Google Cloud are betting Gemini-powered AI agents can take the grunt work out of telco network troubleshooting — without taking humans fully out of the loop.

items.title: Broadband Nation Expo adds co-located Data Center Excellence Summit
items.summary: The Summit is produced in partnership with Fierce Network and the Telecommunications Industry Association (TIA) and takes place November 18-19 at the Hilton Riverside New Orleans in New Orleans, LA.

items.title: Introducing: The Unified Infrastructure Stack
items.summary: The Unified Infrastructure Stack is a useful framework for understanding the next phase of the digital economy.
